title: Section 96
content: 1[96. Mortgage by deposit of title-deeds-- The provisions hereinbefore contained which apply to a simple mortgage shall, so far as may be, apply to a mortgage by deposit of title-deeds.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 20 of 1929, s. 48, for section 95. Original s. 96 was rep. by Act 5 of 1908, s. 156 and Sch. V.
